sections.title: Without an Amulet of ghostspeak or Morytania legs 2 or higher equipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Unicorn
lines.text: Woo wooo!

sections.title: With an Amulet of ghostspeak or Morytania legs 2 or higher equipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Unicorn
lines.text: I am a holy Knight of the Unicorn. I served under the Archpriest of this place who himself served under the Justiciar of the Unicorn.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You don't look like a knight... Don't knights wear plate armour and wield swords and lances and stuff?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Unicorn
lines.text: The title of knight perhaps has a different meaning to you adventurer. In fact, all of the knights of my order are priests who serve under Saradomin.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Unicorn
lines.text: During my life, I spent my time here consecrating the fallen followers of holy Saradomin. I would perform their final rites before laying them to rest within this place.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. So does this place only contain the bodies of these 'knights' who followed Saradomin?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Unicorn
lines.text: Not at all. We also provided these rites for all the citizens of Hallowvale. They were mostly laid to rest on the first two floors.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting. So who is this Justiciar of the Unicorn you spoke of?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Unicorn
lines.text: The Justiciar of the Unicorn? Why this title is only bestowed upon the holiest priest of Saradomin.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Unicorn
lines.text: The justiciar I followed would spread the teachings of Saradomin everywhere he went, converting the masses to our religion.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Unicorn
lines.text: The statue in the north east of this room was created in his likeness when the place was built. I must say though, it does concern me that this is the first you've heard of him and his feats.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I've certainly heard of the word justiciar, but nothing about the Justiciar of the Unicorn.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Unicorn
lines.text: That saddens me greatly. I do hope that he is still carrying out Saradomin's will.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Unicorn
lines.text: Anyway, do tell me adventurer, what brings you to the Hallowed Sepulchre?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found this place within the city of Darkmeyer and that mysterious stranger over there asked me to acquire some Hallowed marks which you and your bretheren were buried with.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Unicorn
lines.text: I see. Did you say Darkmeyer? An interesting name, especially when this region is so bright and full of life.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Unicorn
lines.text: When I was alive this place was known as Hallowvale. Do you know why the queen decided to change the name?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Erm, simply put, the land here is... under new management.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Unicorn
lines.text: Hmm, interesting. I wish I could see for myself but unfortunately, I am unable to leave this place. I do wonder if this new 'management' is the reason my spirit did not pass on to the afterlife.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Perhaps so. However, it's probably best that you can't leave this place. I'm not sure you'd like what you'd find.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Unicorn
lines.text: I fear you may be right adventurer. The last instruction I was given was to help protect this place from invaders by placing magical enchantments on the statues within.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Unicorn
lines.text: I admit, I never dared ask who or what we were protecting it from.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If it's any consolation, the enchantments you placed did prevent the 'invaders' from entering. It's only us human adventurers who enter the Sepulchre.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Although we have been stealing some of your stuff... Sorry about that.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Unicorn
lines.text: It's not like I have any use for my stuff anymore. Thanks adventurer, your words do lighten my spirits somewhat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Aren't you all spirit?

sections.title: Upon opening a coffin in the Hallowed Sepulchre
Without an Amulet of ghostspeak or Morytania legs 2 or higher equipped

lines.speaker: Knight of the Unicorn
lines.text: Woo? Woo wooooooooo!

sections.title: With an Amulet of ghostspeak or Morytania legs 2 or higher equipped

lines.speaker: Knight of the Unicorn
lines.text: You dare defile this sacred place? That treasure doesn't belong to you!
